---
title: &TITLE Sabrina Ciuffoletti 
last: Ciuffoletti
first: Sabrina
people_group: "ResearchFellow"
seniority: 2
email: "sabrina.ciuffoletti@unitn.it"
education:
  - M.S. Mechatronics Engineering | University of Trento | 2026 <br> B.S. Industrial Engineering | University of Trento | 2023
subtitle: "Research Fellow"
description: ""
project: "neu4mes"
affiliation: University of Trento
image: avatar.jpg
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sabrina.ciuffoletti@unitn.it
  #   - text: Google Scholar
  #     icon: mortarboard 
  #     href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_c
  #   - icon: github
  #     text: GitHub 
  #     href: https://github.com/sabrina-ciuffoletti
  #   - icon: globe2
  #     text: Website 
  #     href: https://
---

<hr>


:::{#about}

Sabrina Ciuffoletti is a Research Fellow at the University of Trento, where she achieved her M.S. in Mechatronics Engineering in 2026 and her B.S. in Industrial Engineering in 2023. Her research focuses on the development of modular and scalable planners for vehicles and robotic systems.



## Education
{{< meta education >}}

<br>

:::
## Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
